_notes: Al-Futtaim Automotive sells/services these brands in the UAE via two main
operating companies: Al-Futtaim Motors (Toyota, Lexus, Hino) and Trading
Enterprises (Honda, Volvo, Jeep, Chrysler, Dodge, RAM), plus Al-Futtaim
Reported network size (verify when collecting): Toyota ~14 showrooms +
service centres across all 7 emirates; Trading Enterprises ~31 locations.
The 'locations' list below is a HAND-VERIFIED SEED of recognizable sites.
Run src/enumerate_places.py to expand it to the full network by parsing the
resolve each location to a Google place_id from 'google_maps_query' (or use
